data.title: Mike Shaffer Rejoins Katten as a Partner in Structured Finance
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina, on March 27, 2026, Katten has announced the return of Mike Shaffer as a partner in its Structured Finance practice. Shaffer is back at the firm after his tenure as associate general counsel and managing director at a global real estate investment, operating, and development company. Welcome Mike Shaffer back to Katten!

data.title: CNL STRATEGIC CAPITAL ANNOUNCES OPERATING RESULTS  FOR YEAR-END 2025
data.description: In Orlando, Florida, on March 27, 2026, CNL Strategic Capital, LLC disclosed its focus on delivering income and growth to investors through acquiring majority ownership in addition to loan assets in privately held mid-sized companies. The company revealed its financial performance for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025.

data.title: Unionbusting and safety concerns continue at Rockcliffe Flying Club as CIRB delays certification
data.description: In December 2025, employees at the Rockcliffe Flying Club in Ottawa decided to join the Canadian Union of Public Employees (CUPE) due to worries regarding workplace culture and aircraft safety. However, the process for certification has been prolonged by the employer's actions, including delays, pressure, and acts of retaliation. As a result, despite it being almost four months since filing for union membership, the certification has not been completed. During this period, workers claim that the employer has engaged in questionable tactics.

data.title: HMA Acquires HealthTech Solutions, Expanding Technology Capabilities and Medicaid Expertise
data.description: HMA, a prominent health and human services consulting firm, has revealed its acquisition aimed at bolstering its Government Health Technology Services. This move, announced on March 27, 2026, in Okemos, Mich., is set to enhance the company's data, analytics, and compliance offerings. The acquisition underscores HMA's commitment to growth and innovation in the sector, positioning it as a key player in the industry. This development is expected to significantly impact HMA's service capabilities, with numbers indicating a notable increase in its overall market share and expertise.

data.title: Bitcoin Flashing Late-Stage Business Cycle But This Metric Trends Lower Since 2021, Says Benjamin Cowen
data.description: Bitcoin's price movements are indicating late-cycle signals according to analyst Benjamin Cowen. In a recent podcast, Cowen mentioned how the current setup resembles a late business cycle where capital moves away from riskier assets towards safer options like gold. This explains why altcoins have not performed as well as Bitcoin and why the overall crypto market has not kept up with safer investments like gold. Cowen also observed that Bitcoin continues to follow its usual trend of peaking in post-halving fourth quarters. The latest data since 2021 shows a declining key metric for Bitcoin. For further details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Microsoft, Nvidia Just Fused AI And Atoms — 8 Nuclear Stocks In Focus
data.description: Two tech giants, Microsoft Corp (NASDAQ: MSFT) and Nvidia Corp (NASDAQ: NVDA), have announced a partnership to integrate artificial intelligence into the nuclear energy sector. This collaboration aims to revolutionize the design, construction, and operation of reactors, potentially impacting nuclear-focused stocks positively. The joint efforts of Microsoft and Nvidia, combining Microsoft's cloud and AI infrastructure with Nvidia's computing technologies, are set to enhance processes, reduce manual labor, and ensure consistency in workflow for nuclear projects. The initiative will replace traditional paper-based methods with a digital ecosystem, increasing the efficiency, predictability, and scalability of nuclear plant projects. Through the use of AI and digital simulations, the platform will expedite design processes, streamline regulatory reviews, and provide a more integrated approach to nuclear energy projects. This collaboration is expected to bring significant advancements to the nuclear energy sector.

data.title: Will Bitcoin Potentially Slide Toward $40,000 Zone? Analyst Warns Bottom Not In Yet
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) may potentially decrease further within the range of $60,000–$40,000 as market experiences a mid-cycle drawdown, as per analyst Benjamin Cowen. According to Cowen, in a recent podcast on Friday, Bitcoin has not yet shown signs of hitting bottom, with no typical signals of capitulation evident. He highlights that key valuation metrics such as realized price and balance price have not been breached by BTC, which historically indicates the final market bottoms. Cowen predicts a possible peak-to-trough decline of approximately 70% in this cycle. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Sleepopolis Donates $25,000 to Good360 to Expand Access to Sleep Essentials During National Sleep Awareness Month
data.description: Sleepopolis, a website specializing in sleep health and mattress reviews, has made a donation to support disaster relief efforts. The donation was made public in Charlotte, North Carolina on March 27, 2026 through a press release. In addition to this philanthropic endeavor, Sleepopolis highlighted their collaboration with sleep expert Dr. Raj Dasgupta in creating a free 10-Week Sleep Reset Program. This initiative aims to promote better sleep habits and overall wellbeing.

data.title: Marchesi Frescobaldi Releases New Vintage of Pomino Bianco
data.description: The recently launched Pomino Bianco 2025 makes its debut in global markets, highlighting the distinctive high-altitude white wine terroir of Tuscany. Marchesi Frescobaldi, a renowned Tuscan winemaker, unveiled the latest iteration of Castello Pomino Pomino Bianco. This announcement was made in Pomino, Italy on March 27, 2026.
